creator: emz@norma.perm.ru
text:
Sadly, I cannot confirm the problem appears after adding vlan(4) interfaces.
I have a FreeBSD 9.0-RELEASE host running net/snmp 5.7.1_3, without 
complaining, adding vlan(4) interfaces like below doesn't trigger the 
complains:

# ifconfig
fxp0: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
         options=2009<RXCSUM,VLAN_MTU,WOL_MAGIC>
         ether 00:d0:b7:b7:f9:87
         inet 192.168.3.37 netmask 0xffffff00 broadcast 192.168.3.255
         inet6 fe80::2d0:b7ff:feb7:f987%fxp0 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0x1
         nd6 options=23<PERFORMNUD,ACCEPT_RTADV,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>
         media: Ethernet autoselect (100baseTX <full-duplex>)
         status: active
plip0: flags=8810<POINTOPOINT,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
         nd6 options=23<PERFORMNUD,ACCEPT_RTADV,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>
lo0: flags=8049<UP,LOOPBACK,RUNNING,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 16384
         options=3<RXCSUM,TXCSUM>
         inet6 ::1 prefixlen 128
         inet6 fe80::1%lo0 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0x3
         inet 127.0.0.1 netmask 0xff000000
         nd6 options=23<PERFORMNUD,ACCEPT_RTADV,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>
vlan1: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
         ether 00:d0:b7:b7:f9:87
         inet 127.0.0.2 netmask 0xff000000 broadcast 127.255.255.255
         inet6 fe80::2d0:b7ff:feb7:f987%vlan1 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0x4
         nd6 options=23<PERFORMNUD,ACCEPT_RTADV,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>
         media: Ethernet autoselect (100baseTX <full-duplex>)
         status: active
         vlan: 1 parent interface: fxp0
vlan2: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
         ether 00:d0:b7:b7:f9:87
         inet 127.0.0.3 netmask 0xff000000 broadcast 127.255.255.255
         inet6 fe80::2d0:b7ff:feb7:f987%vlan2 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0x5
         nd6 options=23<PERFORMNUD,ACCEPT_RTADV,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>
         media: Ethernet autoselect (100baseTX <full-duplex>)
         status: active
         vlan: 2 parent interface: fxp0

However, each time I create a vlan(4) interfacse I have the following 
string in log:

Feb 16 01:25:21 zombie snmpd[1002]: netsnmp_assert 0 == 
(ifentry->ns_flags & 0x00000100) failed 
if-mib/ifTable/ifTable_data_access.c:507 _add_new_interface()
